titleStmt.title: SII 40.250: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 250. (A.R. No. B. 295 of 1933.) M훮dala, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up in the compound of the Sakal휆힄varasv훮mi temple.
This is dated 1073, M훮gha, ba. 15, Thursday, Solar eclipse, corresponding to February 7, 1152 A.D. However the cyclic year was Praj훮pati.

Records the gift of 55 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Sakal휆힄varad휆va by Velamuna R휆kama, who was the grand daughter of P흲ti N훮yaka of Siri-Buddh훮mu, and the favorite servant of the king. The gift was entrusted to V카rab흲ya, son of M훮搔뛦b흲ya for supply of ghee to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti 힄akava짢r昭즑昭갶ulu 1073 gun휆昭곢묶i m훮
kha bahala pa昭갷c훮da힄iyu guruv훮ramuna s큰
짢ryyagraha昭놹 nimityamuna sirebudd훮muna p흲tin훮
yaku manma昭읚걄u 힄r카manmah훮ma昭곢툖al휆힄vara 힄r카 v휆lan훮
昭곢묶i kul흲ttu昭갾ga c흲搔뛞go昭걃kar훮jula I昭ａ묶avrittya昭읚걄u
v휆lamunar휆kama tamatallita昭곢툖rulaku dha짢rmmag훮 sakal휆
힄varad휆varakakha昭곢툖ava짢rtti d카pa昭갶unakiccina go昭웙yalu
55 v카ni昭걂휆koni I昭갺dulaku m훮搔뛦b흲yani ko搔뛨u
v카rab흲yu昭곢툖u dana putr훮nupautrikam훮ca昭갺ra짢rkka
mug훮 m훮ne昭곢툖u n휆yi v흲ya昭갾alav훮ru
Digital edition of SII 40.250 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
